content: PS5 Stations (A, B, C, D): There are 4 PlayStation 5 stations available. Each station accommodates up to 4 players and comes with 2 DualSense wireless controllers. The hourly rate is CNY 58 per hour. All PS5 stations include a 65-inch 4K display.

PS5 Station available titles include: Elden Ring, FIFA 25, Gran Turismo 7, Mortal Kombat 1, Spider-Man 2, Hogwarts Legacy, Resident Evil 4 Remake, God of War Ragnarök, Tekken 8, NBA 2K25, Call of Duty Modern Warfare III, Street Fighter 6.

Nintendo Switch Stations (E, F): There are 2 Nintendo Switch stations available. Each station accommodates up to 4 players and comes with 4 Joy-Con controllers (2 pairs). The hourly rate is CNY 48 per hour. All Switch stations include a 55-inch display.

Nintendo Switch Station available titles include: Mario Kart 8 Deluxe, Super Smash Bros. Ultimate, Splatoon 3, Animal Crossing: New Horizons, The Legend of Zelda: Tears of the Kingdom, Kirby and the Forgotten Land, Pokémon Scarlet and Violet, Overcooked! 2, Stardew Valley, Luigi's Mansion 3.

Board game tables (T1, T2, T3): There are 3 board game tables. Each table seats up to 8 players. The hourly rate is CNY 38 per hour per table. A selection of over 80 board games is available for rent at no extra charge, including Catan, Ticket to Ride, Codenames, Pandemic, Exploding Kittens, Werewolf, Coup, Love Letter, and Dixit.
